summary: Iteration 41 - Comprehensive testing of Settings page compact cards, glass dropdown effects, incident acknowledge functionality, Rapid Review rubric panel, and mobile responsiveness. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major features verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 verified all requested features: 1) Settings page theme cards use 8-column grid on desktop (lg:grid-cols-8), 4-column on mobile (grid-cols-4), with 8 theme options. 2) Settings page font cards use 4-column grid with 4 font options (Brand, Duckfake, Kid-Ergarten, Hikaru). 3) Settings page uses CSS variables (bg-[var(--card)], var(--foreground)). 4) Settings page role/title selects have glass-dropdown class. 5) Client Report dropdown has glass blur effect (backdrop-filter: blur(20px)). 6) CrewCapturePage damage/incident selects use glass-dropdown class with var(--accent) background. 7) Overview emergency incident widget has animate-pulse-slow animation and red border. 8) Incident detail modal has 'Mark as Read & Dismiss' button. 9) Incident hover preview has glass blur effect (backdrop-filter: blur(24px)). 10) Metrics widgets row spans full width (col-span-full). 11) Mobile dashboard displays correctly with single-column metrics. 12) Rapid Review page loads with rubric toggle button when rubric categories exist. 13) /api/rubrics/for-task returns 5 categories for bed edging with names, weights, fail/exemplary indicators. 14) /api/incidents/active returns 1 active incident. 15) All timeframe cycling works on Client Report (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly). 16) Export PDF button present on Client Report.

verified_features.settings_theme_cards_compact: Theme cards use lg:grid-cols-8 on desktop, grid-cols-4 on mobile, 8 theme options
verified_features.settings_font_cards_compact: Font cards use grid-cols-4, 4 font options (Brand, Duckfake, Kid-Ergarten, Hikaru)
verified_features.settings_css_variables: Theme card uses bg-[var(--card)] CSS variable
verified_features.client_report_glass_dropdown: Job search dropdown has backdrop-filter: blur(20px)
verified_features.client_report_timeframe_cycling: Daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly periods all work
verified_features.crew_capture_glass_dropdown_damage: Damage type select has glass-dropdown class with var(--accent) background
verified_features.crew_capture_glass_dropdown_incident: Incident type select has glass-dropdown class
verified_features.crew_capture_glass_dropdown_body_part: Body part select has glass-dropdown class
verified_features.overview_incident_detail_modal: Detail modal opens with incident info
verified_features.overview_incident_acknowledge_btn: Mark as Read & Dismiss button present in modal
verified_features.mobile_dashboard_single_column: Metrics display in single column on mobile (390x844)
verified_features.mobile_incident_widget_visible: Emergency incidents widget visible on mobile
verified_features.rapid_review_page_loads: Rapid Review page loads with 29 items in queue
verified_features.rapid_review_rubric_toggle: Rubric toggle button present when rubric categories exist
verified_features.rapid_review_swipe_hud: All swipe HUD elements present (Fail, Pass, Top, Flag)
verified_features.backend_rubrics_for_task: Returns 5 categories for bed edging with proper structure
verified_features.backend_incidents_acknowledge: PATCH endpoint exists for acknowledging incidents
